JSON-LD 1.1.coverage: @context, @type, @id on all resources; namespace collision detection via federation

SHACL.coverage: Produces conformant sh:ValidationReport from compliance/gap analysis + sh:NodeShape generation from graph types

SKOS.coverage: skos:ConceptScheme from type vocabularies, lifecycle phases, and hierarchical taxonomies with broader/narrower

EARL.coverage: earl:Assertion with earl:TestCase, earl:Software assertor, earl:automatic mode

OWL-Time.coverage: time:Interval from critical path scheduling; time:Instant timestamps on federation context events

Dublin Core.coverage: dcterms:title, dcterms:description, dcterms:requires on all resources

PROV-O.coverage: prov:Entity, prov:Activity, prov:Agent with wasDerivedFrom chains; prov:Plan from charter gates with qualifiedAssociation; prov:Generation timestamps on gate completion; prov:Collection event log for federation boundary crossings

schema.org.coverage: schema:additionalType annotations via configurable type mapping

ODRL 2.2.coverage: odrl:Set permission/prohibition matrix by resource type; no asset/party/constraint modeling

Activity Streams 2.0.coverage: as:OrderedCollection of Create activities from topology layers; no actor model or delivery

Verifiable Credentials 2.0.coverage: VerifiableCredential structure wrapping SHACL reports; cryptographic proof out of scope

W3C Org.coverage: org:Organization with type-based OrganizationalUnits; no org:Membership or org:Role

VoID.coverage: void:Dataset with class/property partitions, linkset statistics, and vocabulary usage

Web Annotation.coverage: oa:Annotation with TextualBody, SpecificResource targets, and W3C motivations; no selectors or states

RDFS.coverage: rdfs:Class, rdfs:subClassOf, rdfs:domain/range from type hierarchy; no OWL restrictions or reasoning

DQV.coverage: dqv:QualityMeasurement for completeness, consistency, and accessibility dimensions

DCAT 3.coverage: dcat:Catalog with dcat:Dataset, dcat:Distribution, dcat:DataService, and dcat:theme from @type
